expectations.text: AI pushes back on the monolith instead of speccing all 6 features
expectations.evidence: Baseline immediately responded: 'Absolutely — here's a solid product/technical spec you can use as a starting point' and proceeded to spec all 6 features at once under a full 'Platform Spec Draft' document.

expectations.text: AI asks which feature to tackle first
expectations.evidence: No prioritization question asked. All 6 features were addressed simultaneously without any scope reduction.

expectations.text: Generated prompt uses XML structural tags
expectations.evidence: No final structured prompt was generated — the baseline produced a spec directly in response rather than a copy-pasteable handoff prompt.

expectations.text: Generated prompt assigns a concrete downstream agent persona
Generated prompt includes testable success criteria section
expectations.evidence: No structured handoff prompt with success criteria generated.
